title: Daily Journal Engine
description: Built the core automation engine that generates daily markdown entries with quotes, tech facts, progress tracking, and streak calculations. Runs via GitHub Actions at 6 AM UTC every day.

title: Dark/Light Theme System
description: Implemented a dual-theme design system with CSS custom properties. Toggle persists to localStorage, respects system preference, and transitions smoothly between warm light and deep dark modes.

title: Tech History Timeline
description: Curated 365+ real tech history events spanning from 1945 to 2024. Each day shows a significant moment in computing, space exploration, or internet history with Wikipedia links for deeper reading.

title: Streak Calendar Grid
description: Built a GitHub-style contribution calendar showing daily commit streaks. Filled squares indicate completed entries, with hover tooltips showing dates and a special highlight for today.

title: Markdown Content Pipeline
description: Created a Node.js build script that transforms markdown entries into static HTML pages. Handles front matter, link rewriting, and template injection for Vercel deployment.

title: Search & Filter System
description: Implemented client-side search that filters entries by date, day name, or content. Keyboard shortcut (/) focuses search, Escape clears it, with live result counting for accessibility.

title: RSS Feed Generator
description: Auto-generates a valid RSS 2.0 feed with the 20 most recent entries. Includes proper date formatting, Atom self-link, and is discoverable via HTML link tags in the layout.

title: Progress Tracking Dashboard
description: Tracks yearly goals with a 20-character visual progress bar, streak counters, and build statistics. Updates automatically with each daily commit and persists state in progress.json.

title: Toast Notification System
description: Implemented a toast notification system with success, error, warning, and info variants. Includes auto-dismiss with configurable duration, stack management, and slide-in animations.

title: Form Input Components
description: Created reusable form inputs: text, email, password, textarea, select, checkbox, radio, and toggle. Each with floating labels, validation states, error messages, and accessibility attributes.

title: Form Validation Logic
description: Implemented client-side form validation with Zod schemas. Real-time field validation on blur, debounced async validation, and cross-field validation rules. Display inline error messages.

title: Authentication Flow — Sign Up
description: Built the registration page with email/password fields, password strength indicator, terms acceptance checkbox, and social auth buttons (Google, GitHub). Handles duplicate email and validation errors gracefully.

title: Authentication Flow — Login
description: Developed the login page with email/password form, remember-me toggle, forgot password link, and social login options. Implements rate limiting feedback and session management.

title: Password Reset Flow
description: Created the complete password reset experience: request reset page, email confirmation screen, reset password form with token validation, and success confirmation. Handles expired tokens.

title: User Profile Page
description: Built the user profile page showing avatar, display name, email, join date, and activity stats. Includes avatar upload with preview and crop functionality.

title: Account Settings Panel
description: Designed the settings interface with sections for profile, security, notifications, and preferences. Tab-based navigation with unsaved changes warning on navigation.

title: Dashboard Overview
description: Created the main dashboard with summary cards (total users, revenue, active sessions), recent activity feed, and quick-action buttons. Data visualized with sparkline charts.

title: Data Table Component
description: Built a feature-rich data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, and column resizing. Supports server-side data loading with loading skeletons.

title: Search with Debounce
description: Implemented global search with debounced input, search history suggestions, keyboard navigation through results, and highlighted matching text. Supports multiple entity types.

title: Infinite Scroll Feed
description: Developed an infinite scroll component using Intersection Observer. Supports both top-to-bottom and bidirectional loading with scroll position restoration.

title: File Upload Component
description: Created drag-and-drop file upload with preview thumbnails, progress bars, file type validation, size limits, and multi-file queuing. Supports image, document, and video types.

title: Progress Indicator Component
description: Built linear and circular progress indicators with determinate and indeterminate states. Includes animation, label customization, and color variants.

title: Breadcrumb Navigation
description: Implemented dynamic breadcrumb component that auto-generates from route hierarchy. Supports custom labels, icons between segments, and collapsed overflow.

title: Pagination Component
description: Created accessible pagination with page numbers, prev/next buttons, ellipsis truncation for large page counts, and configurable sibling count.

title: Tabs Component
description: Built accessible tab component with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Home, End), different tab styles (underline, pill, enclosed), and lazy loading of tab panels.

title: Accordion Component
description: Implemented collapsible accordion with single and multiple expand modes, smooth height animation, keyboard navigation, and accessible ARIA attributes.

title: Tooltip Component
description: Created lightweight tooltip with 12 positional variants, delay on show/hide, arrow indicator, and rich HTML content support. Uses portal to avoid overflow clipping.

title: Badge & Tag Components
description: Designed badge and tag components with color variants, size options, dismissible tags, and icon support. Used for status indicators, labels, and filtering.

title: Avatar Component
description: Built avatar component supporting image, initials fallback, and status indicator dot. Includes size variants, group stacking with overlap, and ring borders.

title: Skeleton Loading Screens
description: Implemented skeleton placeholders for cards, tables, text blocks, and full-page layouts. Uses CSS animation for shimmer effect and matches final layout dimensions.

title: Error Boundary Component
description: Created React error boundary with fallback UI showing error message, stack trace in dev mode, and retry button. Logs errors to monitoring service.

title: Empty State Components
description: Designed empty state illustrations for no results, no data, and error states. Includes action buttons, contextual messages, and optional illustration slot.

title: Sidebar Navigation
description: Built collapsible sidebar with nested menu items, active state indicators, section headers, and collapse/expand animation. Supports both static and dynamic menu configuration.

title: Dropdown Menu
description: Implemented accessible dropdown menu with submenus, keyboard navigation, checkable items, and separator support. Positions dynamically based on viewport space.

title: Command Palette (Cmd+K)
description: Created a command palette inspired by VS Code. Fuzzy search across all available commands, keyboard shortcuts, recent actions, and category filtering.

title: Keyboard Shortcuts Manager
description: Built a centralized keyboard shortcut system with configurable bindings, conflict detection, scope-based activation, and a help modal showing all registered shortcuts.

title: Color Picker Component
description: Developed a custom color picker with hue/saturation canvas, opacity slider, hex input, preset swatches, and eyedropper support.

title: Date Picker Component
description: Created a date picker with month/year navigation, range selection, min/max date constraints, keyboard navigation, and custom date formatting.

title: Rich Text Editor
description: Integrated a rich text editor with toolbar for bold, italic, lists, headings, links, and image embedding. Supports markdown shortcuts and HTML output.

title: Code Editor Component
description: Embedded a code editor with syntax highlighting, line numbers, theme support, and read-only mode. Supports multiple languages with language detection.

title: Chart Component — Line
description: Implemented a line chart component with multiple series, tooltips, grid lines, responsive sizing, and smooth curves. Uses SVG for crisp rendering.

title: Chart Component — Bar
description: Built horizontal and vertical bar charts with stacked mode, grouped bars, data labels, and animations. Supports negative values and custom colors per bar.

title: Chart Component — Pie
description: Created pie and donut chart components with arc segments, percentage labels, center text, hover expansion, and legend interaction.

title: Analytics Dashboard
description: Assembled a full analytics dashboard combining line, bar, and metric cards. Includes date range picker, export to CSV, and real-time data refresh.

title: Notification Center
description: Built a notification center with bell icon badge, dropdown list of recent notifications, read/unread states, mark-all-read action, and notification preferences.

title: Activity Feed Component
description: Implemented a chronological activity feed with avatars, action descriptions, timestamps, and load-more pagination. Supports different activity types with icons.

title: Comment System
description: Created a threaded comment system with nested replies, upvoting, rich text input, @mentions, and real-time updates via WebSocket.

title: Rating & Review Component
description: Built star rating component with half-star precision, hover preview, click-to-rate, and read-only display mode. Includes aggregate review summary.

title: Carousel/Slider Component
description: Implemented image carousel with touch swipe support, dot indicators, arrow navigation, autoplay with pause on hover, and infinite loop mode.

title: Responsive Image Component
description: Created a responsive image component with lazy loading, aspect ratio preservation, blur placeholder, srcset generation, and WebP format support.

title: Video Player Component
description: Built a custom video player with play/pause, seek bar, volume control, fullscreen, speed selector, and picture-in-picture support. Accessible keyboard controls.

title: Audio Player Component
description: Created an audio player with waveform visualization, play/pause, seek, volume, playback speed, and playlist queue support. Minimal UI design.

title: Map Component Integration
description: Integrated map component with marker pins, info popups, custom tile layers, geolocation, search box, and cluster grouping for dense markers.

title: QR Code Generator
description: Built a QR code generator component with configurable size, error correction level, foreground/background colors, and download as PNG/SVG.

title: Export to CSV/PDF
description: Implemented data export functionality supporting CSV and PDF formats. Includes column selection, date range filtering, and progress indication for large datasets.

title: Drag and Drop List
description: Created sortable list with drag and drop reordering, touch support, drag handle customization, and animation. Uses HTML5 drag API for zero dependencies.

title: Tree View Component
description: Built a collapsible tree view for hierarchical data with expand/collapse all, search highlighting, drag-and-drop reordering, and lazy child loading.

title: Timeline Component
description: Designed a vertical timeline with alternating left/right item placement, custom icons per entry, connecting lines, and scroll-triggered animations.

title: Stepper Component
description: Implemented a multi-step wizard/stepper with vertical and horizontal orientations, step validation, navigation controls, and animated transitions between steps.

title: Cookie Consent Banner
description: Created GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner with granular preference controls, accept all/necessary toggle, and persistent consent storage.

title: Announcement Bar
description: Built a dismissible announcement bar for site-wide notices. Supports multiple variants (info, warning, success), link actions, and scheduled display.

title: Countdown Timer
description: Implemented a countdown timer component with days/hours/minutes/seconds display, completion callback, and customizable styling for promotional events.

title: Pricing Table Component
description: Designed a pricing table with tiered plans, feature comparison columns, popular plan highlighting, annual/monthly toggle, and CTA buttons.

title: FAQ Accordion Section
description: Created an FAQ section using accordion pattern with search/filter functionality, category grouping, and schema.org structured data for SEO.

title: Testimonial Carousel
description: Built a testimonial slider with avatar, quote, name, and role fields. Includes autoplay, dot navigation, and fade/slide transition effects.

title: Team Members Grid
description: Designed a team member showcase grid with photos, roles, bio preview on hover, and social media links. Includes filter by department.

title: Blog Post Card
description: Created blog post card with cover image, category tag, title, excerpt, author info, reading time, and publish date. Hover effect with subtle elevation.

title: Blog Listing Page
description: Built the full blog listing page with grid layout, category filters, search, pagination, and featured post hero section.

title: Blog Post Layout
description: Designed the single blog post layout with table of contents, related posts sidebar, author bio box, comment section, and social share buttons.

title: Contact Form Page
description: Created a contact page with form fields (name, email, subject, message), Google reCAPTCHA integration, and success/error feedback states.

title: Landing Page Hero
description: Built a compelling hero section with headline, subheading, CTA buttons, background illustration, and floating elements for visual depth.

title: Feature Showcase Section
description: Designed a feature highlights section with icon cards, staggered reveal animations, and alternating image-text layout for key product features.

title: Stats Counter Section
description: Implemented animated statistics counter section with number animations on scroll, icon decoration, and responsive grid layout.

title: Newsletter Signup Form
description: Created a newsletter signup component with email input, submit button, success confirmation, and integration with email marketing service.

title: Footer Component
description: Built a comprehensive footer with multi-column links, social media icons, newsletter signup, legal links, and back-to-top button.

title: 404 Error Page
description: Designed a creative 404 page with illustration, helpful message, navigation links, and search bar to help lost users find their way.

title: Maintenance Mode Page
description: Created a maintenance/coming-soon page with countdown timer, email notification signup, and branded messaging.

title: Onboarding Flow
description: Built a multi-step onboarding wizard for new users with progress tracking, skip option, and personalization questions to tailor the experience.

title: API Route — User CRUD
description: Implemented RESTful API routes for user management: create, read, update, delete. Includes request validation, error handling, and pagination support.

title: API Route — Authentication
description: Created authentication API routes: login, register, logout, refresh token, and verify email. Uses JWT with HTTP-only cookies for secure session management.

title: API Route — File Upload
description: Built file upload API endpoint with multipart form handling, file type validation, size limits, cloud storage integration, and thumbnail generation.

title: Database Schema — Users
description: Designed and migrated the users table with all required fields, indexes, and row-level security policies. Includes profile and preferences tables.

title: Database Schema — Content
description: Created database schema for content management: posts, categories, tags, and media library tables. Implemented full-text search indexes.

title: Database Schema — Analytics
description: Set up analytics data model with events table, session tracking, page view aggregation, and performance-optimized materialized views.

title: Middleware — Rate Limiting
description: Implemented rate limiting middleware using token bucket algorithm. Configurable limits per endpoint with Redis-backed storage for distributed environments.

title: Middleware — Authentication
description: Created authentication middleware that validates JWT tokens, attaches user context to request, and handles role-based access control checks.

title: Middleware — Request Logging
description: Added request logging middleware with structured JSON output, response time measurement, request ID generation, and sensitive data redaction.

title: Error Handling Middleware
description: Built centralized error handling middleware that catches all exceptions, returns consistent error responses, and logs stack traces in development.

title: Environment Configuration
description: Set up environment-based configuration system with validation using Zod. Supports development, staging, and production environments with typed config objects.

title: Database Migrations Setup
description: Configured database migration tool with versioned migrations, up/down rollback support, seed data scripts, and automated migration on deploy.

title: Testing — Unit Tests
description: Wrote unit tests for utility functions, hooks, and components using Vitest. Achieved 85% coverage with edge case handling and mock implementations.

title: Testing — Integration Tests
description: Created integration tests for API endpoints, database operations, and authentication flow. Tests run against a test database with automated setup/teardown.

title: Testing — E2E Tests
description: Set up end-to-end testing with Playwright covering critical user journeys: signup, login, content creation, and settings update. CI pipeline integration.

title: CI/CD Pipeline Setup
description: Configured GitHub Actions for continuous integration: lint, type-check, test, build. Added deploy job with environment promotion gates.

title: Performance Optimization
description: Audited and optimized bundle size with code splitting, lazy loading, image optimization, and tree shaking. Reduced initial load by 40%.

title: SEO Optimization
description: Implemented SEO best practices: meta tags, Open Graph, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap generation, canonical URLs, and robots.txt configuration.

title: Accessibility Audit
description: Conducted comprehensive accessibility audit using axe-core and manual testing. Fixed contrast ratios, keyboard navigation gaps, and screen reader issues.

title: Security Hardening
description: Applied security best practices: CSP headers, XSS protection, SQL injection prevention, CSRF tokens, secure cookie flags, and dependency vulnerability scanning.

title: PWA Implementation
description: Converted the app into a Progressive Web App with service worker, manifest.json, offline fallback page, and install prompt for mobile users.

title: i18n Internationalization
description: Set up internationalization framework with locale detection, translation files, pluralization rules, date/number formatting, and language switcher UI.

title: WebSocket Real-time Updates
description: Integrated WebSocket connection for real-time features: live notifications, collaborative editing, presence indicators, and data sync across clients.

title: Sentry Error Monitoring
description: Integrated Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring. Added source maps, breadcrumbs, user context, and custom performance spans for critical paths.

title: Analytics Integration
description: Added privacy-focused analytics tracking with custom events, page views, user sessions, and dashboard for monitoring key metrics and user behavior.

title: Documentation — Component Library
description: Created comprehensive component documentation with usage examples, props tables, live previews, and accessibility notes. Published as a Storybook site.

title: Documentation — API Reference
description: Built interactive API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger specification, request/response examples, code snippets, and try-it-out functionality.

title: Final Release & Deployment
description: Orchestrated production release with zero-downtime deployment, environment health checks, rollback plan, release notes, and post-deployment monitoring.

title: Solar Product Catalog
description: Built a product catalog for solar panels, inverters, and batteries with filtering by wattage, brand, and price range. Integrated with BuySolar.ng inventory API.

title: Energy Calculator Tool
description: Created an interactive energy consumption calculator that recommends solar system sizes based on daily usage, location, and budget. Includes ROI projection.

title: Installation Booking System
description: Implemented a booking flow for solar installation appointments with calendar integration, technician assignment, and automated confirmation emails.

title: Payment Checkout Flow
description: Built a secure checkout experience with Paystack integration, installment plan selection, order summary, and receipt generation. Handles failed payments gracefully.

title: Customer Dashboard
description: Created a customer portal showing order history, installation status, warranty information, and energy savings tracker with monthly comparisons.

title: Admin Inventory Management
description: Built an admin panel for managing solar product inventory with bulk upload, stock alerts, price updates, and supplier tracking.

title: Real-time Order Tracking
description: Implemented live order tracking with status updates, delivery ETA, technician location map, and push notifications for status changes.

title: WhatsApp Business Integration
description: Integrated WhatsApp Business API for automated customer support, order confirmations, and installation reminders. Handles template messages and media sharing.

title: Email Notification System
description: Built a transactional email system using Resend API with templates for welcome, order confirmation, shipping updates, and promotional campaigns.

title: User Authentication with OAuth
description: Implemented social login with Google and GitHub OAuth providers. Includes account linking, session management, and secure token refresh.

title: Role-Based Access Control
description: Created RBAC system with admin, manager, and customer roles. Permission matrix controls access to admin panel, reports, and API endpoints.

title: Image Optimization Pipeline
description: Set up automatic image optimization with Sharp for product photos. Generates WebP variants, responsive sizes, and blur placeholders on upload.

title: Search Engine with Filters
description: Implemented full-text search across products with faceted filtering by category, price, rating, and availability. Uses debounce and URL state sync.

title: Wishlist & Save for Later
description: Built wishlist functionality with add/remove toggles, save-for-later cart feature, and sync across devices using persistent backend storage.

title: Product Reviews & Ratings
description: Created a review system with star ratings, photo uploads, verified purchase badges, helpful vote buttons, and anti-spam moderation.

title: Inventory Low-Stock Alerts
description: Implemented automated alerts when product stock drops below threshold. Sends email and Slack notifications to warehouse team.

title: Multi-Currency Support
description: Added currency conversion with real-time exchange rates. Supports NGN, USD, GBP, and EUR with automatic detection based on user location.

title: Referral Program System
description: Built a referral tracking system with unique referral codes, commission calculation, payout scheduling, and fraud detection rules.

title: Abandoned Cart Recovery
description: Implemented cart abandonment detection with automated email sequences. Includes product reminders, discount incentives, and conversion tracking.

title: A/B Testing Framework
description: Set up client-side A/B testing with variant assignment, cookie persistence, and conversion tracking. Integrated with analytics for statistical significance.

title: Content Management System
description: Built a headless CMS for managing blog posts, product descriptions, and landing pages with rich text editing, image uploads, and publish scheduling.

title: Automated Backup System
description: Implemented daily automated database backups with S3 storage, 30-day retention, encryption at rest, and one-click restore functionality.

title: Health Check Endpoints
description: Created /health and /ready endpoints that verify database connectivity, external API status, disk space, and memory usage. Used for container orchestration.

title: Graceful Shutdown Handler
description: Implemented process shutdown handler that drains in-flight requests, closes database connections, and flushes logs before exiting cleanly.

title: Request Idempotency Layer
description: Built idempotency middleware that prevents duplicate processing of retry requests using idempotency keys stored in Redis with TTL.

title: API Response Caching
description: Implemented response caching with Redis for frequently accessed endpoints. Includes cache invalidation on writes and stale-while-revalidate pattern.

title: Database Connection Pooling
description: Configured connection pooling with PgBouncer for efficient PostgreSQL connection management. Tuned pool size, idle timeout, and max connections.

title: Server-Side Rendering Optimization
description: Optimized SSR performance with streaming HTML, selective hydration, and React Server Components. Reduced Time to First Byte by 60%.

title: Static Site Generation
description: Implemented SSG for marketing pages and blog posts with incremental static regeneration. Pages rebuild in background on content updates.

title: Edge Function Deployment
description: Deployed API routes to edge locations for low-latency responses. Handles authentication, rate limiting, and geo-based routing at the edge.

title: Database Row-Level Security
description: Implemented RLS policies in Supabase to ensure users can only access their own data. Policies enforced at database level, not application layer.

title: File Storage with RLS
description: Set up Supabase Storage buckets with row-level security policies. Users can only upload/read files in their own folders.

title: Real-time Presence System
description: Built a presence system showing online status of users with heartbeats, typing indicators, and last-seen timestamps using Supabase Realtime.

title: Collaborative Editing
description: Implemented real-time collaborative document editing with operational transforms, conflict resolution, and cursor position sync.

title: Version Control for Content
description: Created a version history system for content changes with diff viewing, restore functionality, and change attribution.

title: Audit Log System
description: Built an audit trail that logs all data mutations with user, timestamp, before/after values, and IP address. Queryable via admin panel.

title: Webhook Delivery System
description: Implemented webhook dispatch with retry logic, exponential backoff, delivery logs, and a management interface for registering endpoints.

title: Scheduled Task Runner
description: Built a cron-like task scheduler for recurring jobs: report generation, data cleanup, cache warming, and notification batching.

title: Feature Flag System
description: Created feature flags with percentage rollouts, user segment targeting, environment-specific overrides, and a management dashboard.

title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
description: Implemented tenant isolation with shared database, schema-per-tenant, and middleware that routes requests to correct tenant context.

title: API Versioning Strategy
description: Set up API versioning with URL prefix (/v1/, /v2/) and deprecation headers. Includes version negotiation and backward compatibility layer.

title: GraphQL API Layer
description: Built a GraphQL API with type-safe resolvers, dataloader for N+1 prevention, query complexity limits, and persisted queries.

title: REST API Documentation
description: Generated interactive API docs with Redoc from OpenAPI spec. Includes authentication examples, error codes, and rate limit headers.

title: Database Seeding Scripts
description: Created reproducible seed scripts that populate development database with realistic test data. Supports faker for names, addresses, and products.

title: Docker Containerization
description: Containerized the application with multi-stage Docker build. Includes production optimizations, health checks, and non-root user execution.

title: Kubernetes Deployment
description: Deployed application to Kubernetes with horizontal pod autoscaling, rolling updates, resource limits, and liveness/readiness probes.

title: SSL/TLS Certificate Setup
description: Configured automatic SSL certificates with Let's Encrypt and Certbot. Includes renewal automation and HSTS headers.

title: CDN Configuration
description: Set up Cloudflare CDN with edge caching, Brotli compression, image optimization, and DDoS protection for static assets.

title: Monitoring & Alerting
description: Implemented monitoring with Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, and PagerDuty alerts for error rates, latency spikes, and resource usage.

title: Log Aggregation
description: Set up centralized logging with structured JSON output, log levels, correlation IDs, and search via Loki/Grafana.

title: Database Backup & Recovery
description: Implemented automated daily backups with point-in-time recovery, cross-region replication, and tested restore procedures.

title: Load Testing Suite
description: Created load tests with k6 to validate API performance under concurrent users. Benchmarks response times, error rates, and throughput.

title: Security Penetration Testing
description: Conducted penetration testing covering OWASP Top 10, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, authentication bypass, and privilege escalation vectors.

title: Dependency Vulnerability Scanning
description: Set up automated dependency scanning with Dependabot and Snyk. Alerts on known vulnerabilities with auto-PR for safe upgrades.

title: Code Quality Gates
description: Implemented CI quality gates: test coverage threshold, bundle size limit, accessibility score, Lighthouse performance budget.

title: Git Hooks & Linting
description: Configured pre-commit hooks with Husky and lint-staged. Runs ESLint, Prettier, and type checks on staged files before commit.

title: Commit Convention Enforcement
description: Enforced conventional commits with commitlint. Validates message format, scope, and type for automated changelog generation.

title: Automated Changelog
description: Generated changelogs from conventional commits using standard-version. Includes breaking changes, features, bug fixes, and dependency updates.

title: Semantic Versioning Automation
description: Automated version bumping based on commit types: patch for fixes, minor for features, major for breaking changes.

title: Staging Environment Setup
description: Created a staging environment that mirrors production with subset data, feature flags enabled, and external API sandboxes.

title: Blue-Green Deployment
description: Implemented blue-green deployment strategy with instant rollback capability, health checks, and traffic shifting.

title: Feature Branch Previews
description: Set up automatic preview deployments for every pull request with unique URLs, database seeding, and environment variables.

title: Database Query Optimization
description: Optimized slow queries with EXPLAIN ANALYZE, added composite indexes, implemented query result caching, and reduced N+1 queries.

title: Memory Leak Detection
description: Set up memory profiling with clinic.js, identified and fixed three memory leaks in event listeners and cache eviction.

title: Bundle Analysis & Splitting
description: Analyzed bundle with webpack-bundle-analyzer, split vendor chunks, lazy-loaded routes, and reduced initial bundle by 45%.

title: Image Lazy Loading
description: Implemented native lazy loading with Intersection Observer fallback. Added blur-up placeholders and responsive srcset for product images.

title: Service Worker Caching
description: Built a service worker with cache-first strategy for static assets and network-first for API calls. Includes offline fallback page.

title: Web Vitals Monitoring
description: Integrated web vitals tracking for LCP, FID, CLS, TTFB, and INP. Reports to analytics dashboard with trend analysis.

title: Error Tracking Dashboard
description: Created an error tracking dashboard showing error frequency, affected users, stack traces, and resolution status with assignee workflow.

title: User Session Recording
description: Implemented privacy-respecting session recording with heatmap generation, click tracking, and rage click detection for UX improvement.

title: A/B Test Results Analysis
description: Built an analysis tool for A/B test results with statistical significance calculation, confidence intervals, and decision recommendations.

title: Customer Support Ticketing
description: Created a ticketing system with auto-categorization, SLA tracking, priority escalation, and customer satisfaction surveys.

title: Live Chat Integration
description: Integrated live chat widget with agent assignment, canned responses, file sharing, and chat history persistence.

title: SMS Notification System
description: Built SMS notifications via Termii API for order updates, delivery alerts, and two-factor authentication codes.

title: Push Notification Service
description: Implemented web push notifications with VAPID keys, subscription management, and segmented campaigns for re-engagement.

title: Social Media Auto-Posting
description: Created automated social media posting for new blog content across Twitter, LinkedIn, and Facebook with platform-specific formatting.

title: SEO Audit Tool
description: Built an internal SEO audit tool that checks meta tags, heading structure, image alt text, internal links, and Core Web Vitals.

title: Performance Budget Enforcement
description: Set up Lighthouse CI with performance budgets. Fails build if LCP, FID, or CLS exceeds defined thresholds.

title: Database Migration Rollback
description: Implemented automated rollback procedures for failed database migrations with data integrity verification and notification.

title: API Rate Limit Dashboard
description: Created a dashboard showing API usage patterns, rate limit violations, top consumers, and capacity planning projections.

title: Multi-Language Content
description: Added English and Yoruba language support for the song encyclopedia app with language switcher and content management.

title: Music Sheet PDF Viewer
description: Built an in-app PDF viewer for music sheets with page navigation, zoom controls, and offline caching for practice sessions.

title: Chord Progression Library
description: Created a searchable chord progression database with key filtering, genre tags, and playback preview using Web Audio API.

title: Piano Practice Timer
description: Implemented a practice session tracker with metronome, tempo adjustment, session recording, and progress charts over time.

title: Church Song Request System
description: Built a song request system for church services with scheduling, key selection, and musician notification workflow.

title: Invoice Generation System
description: Created PDF invoice generation with line items, tax calculation, payment status tracking, and email delivery.

title: Expense Tracking Dashboard
description: Built a personal finance dashboard with category breakdown, monthly trends, budget vs actual comparison, and savings goals.

title: Client Project Tracker
description: Implemented a project management board with Kanban columns, task assignment, due dates, time tracking, and milestone progress.

title: Time Tracking Tool
description: Created a time tracking system with project-based timers, weekly timesheet view, and export to CSV for invoicing.

title: Portfolio Case Studies
description: Built detailed case study pages for each project with problem statement, solution, tech stack, screenshots, and results.

title: Client Testimonial Collector
description: Implemented an automated testimonial collection flow with email requests, rating scales, and publishable quote generation.

title: Freelance Rate Calculator
description: Created a calculator for determining hourly rates based on expenses, target income, billable hours, and market benchmarks.

title: Contract Template Generator
description: Built a contract generator with customizable templates, digital signature integration, and automated follow-up reminders.

title: GitHub Contribution Graph
description: Analyzed GitHub contribution patterns and created a custom visualization showing commit frequency, languages, and streak history.

title: Automated README Generator
description: Built a tool that generates README.md files from package.json, source code comments, and API documentation.

title: Code Snippet Manager
description: Created a personal code snippet library with syntax highlighting, tag filtering, search, and clipboard copy functionality.

title: Developer Blog Platform
description: Set up a personal developer blog with MDX support, syntax highlighting, RSS feed, and newsletter subscription.

title: Open Source Contribution Tracker
description: Built a tracker for open source contributions with PR status, review requests, and impact metrics across repositories.

title: API Health Monitor
description: Created a monitoring dashboard showing uptime, response times, error rates, and alert history for all client APIs.

title: Database Schema Visualizer

description: Registered as a share target to receive shared content from other apps on mobile devices.

title: Periodic Background Sync
description: Implemented periodic background sync for fetching fresh data when app is reopened.

title: Content Indexing API
description: Registered content with Content Indexing API for surfacing in device search and launchers.

title: File System Access API
description: Implemented File System Access API for direct file saving without download dialog.

title: Storage Manager API
description: Integrated Storage Manager API for requesting persistent storage and estimating usage.

title: Broadcast Channel API
description: Used Broadcast Channel API for cross-tab communication and state synchronization.

title: Idle Detection API
description: Implemented idle detection for auto-saving drafts and pausing video when user is idle.

title: Web Locks API
description: Used Web Locks API for coordinating access to shared resources across tabs.

title: Compression Streams API
description: Implemented Compression Streams API for gzip compression in the browser for upload optimization.

title: Scheduler API
description: Used Scheduler API for yielding to the browser during long tasks to maintain responsiveness.

title: Navigation API
description: Adopted Navigation API for SPA routing with history manipulation and transition support.

title: DocumentPictureInPicture
description: Implemented Document Picture-in-Picture for floating video windows during multitasking.

title: Web Transport Protocol
description: Integrated Web Transport for low-latency bidirectional communication with server.

title: WebSocket Streams
description: Used WebSocket Streams for efficient binary data streaming from server to client.

title: File API Streaming
description: Implemented streaming file reading with ReadableStream for processing large files in chunks.

title: Blob Stream Processing
description: Built blob stream processing for converting between formats without loading entire files into memory.

title: Web Workers Offloading
description: Offloaded heavy computation to Web Workers for maintaining main thread responsiveness.

title: SharedArrayBuffer Parallelism
description: Used SharedArrayBuffer for parallel data processing across multiple workers.

title: Service Worker Cache API
description: Implemented advanced Cache API strategies: stale-while-revalidate, cache-then-network, and network-only.

title: Background Fetch API
description: Used Background Fetch API for large downloads that continue even when app is closed.

title: Push Notification API
description: Implemented Push Notification API with VAPID keys, subscription management, and notification clicks.

title: Notification API
description: Integrated Notification API with permission handling, notification clicks, and action buttons.

title: Geolocation API
description: Implemented Geolocation API for location-based features with permission handling and fallback.

title: Device Orientation API
description: Used Device Orientation API for tilt-based interactions and motion-controlled UI elements.

title: Battery Status API
description: Integrated Battery Status API for reducing animations and background sync when battery is low.

title: Network Information API
description: Used Network Information API to adjust image quality and data loading based on connection type.

title: Media Devices API
description: Implemented camera and microphone access with MediaDevices API for video chat and scanning features.

title: Web Audio API
description: Integrated Web Audio API for audio visualization, synthesis, and processing in the music app.

title: Media Session API
description: Implemented Media Session API for system media controls, notification display, and lock screen controls.

title: Picture-in-Picture API
description: Added Picture-in-Picture support for video content with system-level floating window.

title: Fullscreen API
description: Implemented Fullscreen API for immersive video and image viewing with keyboard shortcut support.

title: Screen Wake Lock API
description: Used Screen Wake Lock API to prevent screen from sleeping during active tasks like reading music.

title: Virtual Reality API
description: Explored WebXR API for potential VR portfolio visualization in future projects.
